description_long: This ornate sconce features a central column from which six elegantly curved arms extend outward, each supporting a lampshade. The arms are adorned with delicate leaf motifs and small hanging crystal-like ornaments, adding a touch of sophistication and classic charm. The shades are semi-transparent, likely made of frosted or fabric-covered glass, and are evenly spaced around the fixture. The central stem is robust and connects to a decorative ceiling mount via a short chain. The overall design is symmetrical, with each arm mirroring the others, and the fixture is finished in a light metallic or painted tone. The sconce exudes a vintage, luxurious feel, suitable for upscale urban interiors or classic public spaces.
description: A vintage-style ceiling sconce with six arms, each holding a lampshade, adorned with leaf motifs and hanging crystal decorations. The fixture is ornate, symmetrical, and finished in a light metallic or painted color.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing all six lampshades, the central column, and the decorative leaf and crystal elements.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the symmetry of the arms and the even spacing of the lampshades, with the central column and ceiling mount visible.
description_view_2: Rear angled view similar to the front, showing the back of the lampshades and the continuation of the decorative motifs.
description_view_3: Direct side view emphasizing the profile of the sconce, the curvature of the arms, and the alignment of the shades.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a vintage, ornate design with classical influences, featuring curved arms, leaf motifs, and hanging crystal decorations. Its symmetrical arrangement and decorative details evoke a sense of luxury and elegance.
